Check for variables that resemble count variables

Source: R/check_feature.R
check_count.Rd

Identify variables that only have only (non-negative) integer values and a relatively small number of distinct values

Usage

check_count(x, thres = NULL, non_neg = TRUE, quiet = FALSE)

Arguments

x

data set to check

thres

number of distinct integer values

non_neg

logical controlling whether to only consider variables with non-negative values. Defaults to TRUE.

quiet

whether to suppress printing messages to the console. defaults to FALSE.

Value

invisibly returns a list for downstream use in check_feature()

On this page
